overview.description: The NEOS Boosted Bitcoin High Income ETF (XBCI) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in long btc, short usd currency. The fund is a fund-of-funds that aims for tax-efficient and high monthly income by actively investing in ETPs with exposure to Bitcoin. The fund employs leverage and call option strategies to enhance income. XBCI was launched on Feb 3, 2026 and is issued by Neos.
